description: HiBob provides Bob, an HR and people operations platform for managing employee data, time off, tasks, documents, hiring, reporting, and related workforce workflows. It is used by organizations to run HR processes and connect those workflows with external systems.
summary: HiBob exposes a REST-based Bob Public API authenticated with service-user Basic auth, plus a hosted MCP server documented as supporting both service-user access and newer OAuth-based user access; no public GraphQL API or CLI was found.
